steps.title: Recognize the two-part requirement
steps.content: The goal requires emphasizing the magnitude of the decline AND specifying why it occurred. A winning choice must accomplish both, not just one.

steps.title: Apply the requirements to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C accomplishes both by stating the decline (“loss of thousands of varieties”) and explaining the cause: industrial agriculture drove farmers to prioritize varieties “suitable for commercial growth.” The other three either omit the causal explanation (B), focus on recovery rather than the decline (A), or discuss crops broadly without specifying apples or the commercial mechanism (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
